title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Future Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Future Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Future Retail! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
